zh.lifeSummary: 當John Harleston於1430年11月1日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德維爾時，他的父親John Harleston30歲，母親Alice Clopton26歲。他於1452年與Margaret Bardwell在英國英格蘭素福爾可肯特維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年在英國英格蘭素福爾可普林恩享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Harleston于1430年11月1日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德維爾时，他的父亲John Harleston30岁，母亲Alice Clopton26岁。他于1452年与Margaret Bardwell在英国英格兰素福爾可肯特維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年在英国英格兰素福爾可普林恩享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (West Lothian) and English: patronymic, with intrusive -t-, from the personal name Charles (compare Charleson ). The various places called Charleston are all of recent origin, so they are unlikely to be the source of the surname.

variants.name: Charles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Antoine, Andre, Francois, Patrice, Germaine, Magalie, Philippe, Yves, Alain, Jacques, Cecile.

French, Welsh, English, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the French form of the ancient Germanic personal name Karl ‘man, husband, freeman’, which was Latinized as Carolus. In France the personal name was popular from an early date, due to the fame of the Emperor Charlemagne (c. 742–814; Latin name Carolus Magnus, i.e. Charles the Great). The Old French form Charles was briefly introduced to England by the Normans, but was rare during the main period of surname formation. It was introduced more successfully to Scotland in the 16th century by the Stuarts, who had strong ties with France, and was brought by them to England in the 17th century. Its frequency as a Welsh surname is attributable to the late date of Welsh surname formation. Old English Ceorl ‘peasant’ is also found as a byname, but the resulting Middle English form, Charl, with a patronymic in -s, if it existed at all, would have been absorbed by the French form introduced by the Normans. English variants pronounced with initial k- for the most part reflect the cognate Old Norse personal name Karl, Karli. Compare Carl .

English: in some cases, possibly a habitational name from Charles (Devon), or a post-medieval variant of Cherrill, with excrescent -s, perhaps by false association with the personal name Charles. Cherrill is either a habitational name from Cherhill in Wilshire, or a status name from Middle English cherl, cheril, charl, chirl ‘churl, bonded tenant, serf; peasant’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Harleston was born on 1 November 1430, in Bardwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Harleston, was 30 and his mother, Alice Clopton, was 26. He married Margaret Bardwell in 1452, in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1458, in Shimplingthorne, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Harleston est né le 1 novembre 1430, à Bardwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Harleston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Clopton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bardwell en 1452, à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1458, à Shimplingthorne, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Harleston am 1. November 1430 in Bardwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Harleston 30 und seine Mutter Alice Clopton 26. Er hat 1452 in Kentwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Bardwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1458 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Shimplingthorne, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Harleston è nato il il 1 novembre 1430 nel Bardwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Harleston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Clopton, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Bardwell nel 1452, nel Kentwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1458, nel Shimplingthorne, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Harlestonが1430年11月1日にイギリスイギリススフォルクバードウエルで生まれた時，父John Harlestonは30歳，母Alice Cloptonは26歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントウエルでMargaret Bardwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年にイギリスイギリススフォルクシュインプリンソルンで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Harleston(이)가 1430년 11월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바드웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Harleston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Clopton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄트웰에서 Margaret Bardwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 시플링토른에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Harleston nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1430, em Bardwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Harleston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Clopton, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bardwell em 1452, em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1458, em Shimplingthorne, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Harleston родился 1 ноября 1430 г. в местности бардвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Harleston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Clopton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bardwell в 1452 г. в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1458 г. в местности шимплингтаурн, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Harleston nació el 1 de noviembre de 1430, en Bardwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Harleston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Clopton, tenía 26 años. Murió en 1458, en Shimplingthorne, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años.
